== Notes for [[Item:Q105863|Q105863]] ==

'''Same as brother [http://www.geni.com/people/Abdullah-bin-Maulana-Abbas-bin-Maulana-Ali/6000000018919975616/ Abdullah bin Maulana Abbas bin Maulana Ali]?'''

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ubaydullah_ibn_al-Abbas

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018912443823

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
